packageRules.description: Keep setup-node's CI runtime value pinned to Node 20.20.0; this is the lowest existing consumer runtime and must not drift to patch releases.
Keep brute-knex on Knex v2 for its default store dependency; Ghost uses Knex 2.x and existing consumer compatibility with a provided Knex 0.21.6 instance is covered by CI.
Keep CI MySQL services on the 8.4 line; Ghost and existing consumers use MySQL 8 and compatibility testing must not drift to newer server majors.
Keep pnpm on 10.x while this repo supports Node 20.20.0; pnpm 11 requires Node 22.13 or newer.
